title: Analects 9.5: Heaven's Culture Cannot Be Destroyed
description: When threatened, Confucius declares that if Heaven intended this culture to survive, no one can destroy it.
introduction: When threatened, Confucius declares that if Heaven intended this culture to survive, no one can destroy it.

translation.text: If Heaven intends this culture to be destroyed, then I, a future dead man, shall not be able to share in it. But if Heaven does not intend it to be destroyed, what can the people of Kuang do to me?
